## Findings

| Phase | Check | Result | Detail |
|---|---|:--:|---|
| SECURITY | secret scan (tracked files) | ✓ PASS | 90 tracked files — no live keys/tokens |
| SECURITY | SQL parameterisation | ✓ PASS | all .execute() calls use %s parameters |
| SECURITY | security headers + CSP | ✓ PASS | strict CSP + nosniff/referrer/frame-ancestors on server & CDN |
| SECURITY | path-traversal guard | ✓ PASS | static serve uses realpath + root-boundary + isfile |
| SECURITY | XML parsing (RSS) | i INFO | stdlib ElementTree on trusted HTTPS feeds (no XXE surface); consider defusedxml only if feeds widen to untrusted sources |
| SECURITY | dependency pinning | ✓ PASS | 3 deps, all version-constrained |
| STABILITY | compile all modules | ✓ PASS | 35 modules compile clean |
| STABILITY | console utf-8 guard | ✓ PASS | run.py forces utf-8 stdout (Windows cp1252 safe) |
| STABILITY | self-standing run (run.py health) | ✓ PASS | CLI ran; DB connected |
| STABILITY | error non-leak | ✓ PASS | API errors log server-side, return generic 500 |
| LOAD | load test (static build) | ✓ PASS | 789 req/s, 0 errors over 1500 reqs (c=32) |
| HYGIENE | orphan modules | ✓ PASS | every module is reachable |

| HYGIENE | TODO/FIXME markers | i INFO | 10 markers (informational) |

## Load test

- **789 req/s** sustained, **0 errors** over 1500 requests against the static `dist/` build (single local Python process — a CDN fans this across edge nodes).
